title: Forge slice subscriptions (.forge/subscriptions.json)
description: Per-active-root project state: which catalog SLICES the project has opted into. A SLICE is a named group of ONE source's catalog records; in v1 a slice is one source's records of a single registry kind, with slice id "<sourceId>/<kind>" (ADR-0018). New slices default UNSUBSCRIBED (opt-in, consistent with sources defaulting untrusted, ADR-0017). The catalog READ-VIEW = library-local records (source === null, always present) UNION records whose slice id is listed in `subscribed`. Owned by manager/slices.mjs (forge slice list|subscribe|unsubscribe). Writes are ADDITIVE and never destructive (writeJsonAtomic via manager/lib/store.mjs); subscribing/unsubscribing only adds/removes one slice id. This file lives UNDER the active project root, not in the git-tracked library, and is created on first --apply.

schema.description: On-disk schema tag for this file.

_note.description: Free-form authoring note; ignored by the slice operator.

subscribed.description: The slice ids this project has opted into. Each id is "<sourceId>/<kind>" (forward slash; resource uids use "<kind>:<id>", so "/" avoids ambiguity). An absent or unlisted slice is UNSUBSCRIBED. Order is not significant; ids SHOULD be unique (the operator dedups on write).

sliceId.description: A slice id "<sourceId>/<kind>": the source id (manifests/sources.json#sources[].id) and the singular registry kind (agent|skill|command|rule|hook|bundle|validator|mcp|meta-test|engine), joined by a single forward slash.
